title: Quiltmaking Traditions
description: A lesson on craft, storytelling, design, and cultural memory through quilts.

quiz.q: Quiltmaking can be both a craft and what else?
quiz.explanation: Quiltmaking can carry stories and memory.

quiz.q: Why are quilts important in artistry lessons?
choices: They combine design, skill, and meaning
quiz.explanation: Quilts combine visual design and cultural meaning.

quiz.q: A quilt can help preserve what?
quiz.explanation: Quilts can preserve memory and identity.

quiz.q: Why do students study quilt traditions?
choices: To see how craft can carry history
quiz.explanation: Quilt traditions show how craft can carry history.

quiz.q: Which word best fits quiltmaking in this category?

title: Beadwork and Design
description: A lesson on pattern, skill, symbolism, and handmade design traditions.

quiz.q: Beadwork is often valued for what?
quiz.explanation: Beadwork often includes pattern, skill, and symbolism.

quiz.q: Why does beadwork fit artistry lessons?
choices: It combines design with handmade craft
quiz.explanation: Beadwork combines design and handcrafted skill.

quiz.q: A big idea in beadwork lessons is what?
quiz.explanation: Details and patterns can hold meaning.

quiz.q: What can students learn from beadwork?
choices: Craft traditions can be both artistic and cultural
quiz.explanation: Beadwork shows how craft can be artistic and cultural.

quiz.q: Which category best fits beadwork here?
quiz.explanation: Beadwork belongs in crafts and artistry.
